name: rolycoly
flavor_texts: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago.
It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.
text: Rolycoly is the Coal Pokémon. It is a rock-type Pokémon. Abilities: steam-engine, heatproof, flash-fire (hidden). Base stats — HP: 30, Attack: 40, Defense: 50, Sp. Atk: 40, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 30. Evolution line: rolycoly → carkol → coalossal. Lore: Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago. It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.
